welcome_desc: Optimize, clean, and configure Windows safely. Select your desired tweaks or use a quick Preset to get started.
confirm_run: Do you want to run the selected optimizations?
confirm_undo: Do you want to restore all settings to Windows defaults?
confirm_preset: Do you want to run this automatic Preset?
confirm_apps: Do you want to install the selected applications?
update_restart_msg: An update has been downloaded. The app will close and update automatically. Continue?
preset_recommended_desc: Applies the safest tweaks to improve speed and privacy without breaking Windows.
preset_cleanup_desc: Clears DNS cache, temporary files, Recycle Bin, and Windows Update leftovers.

02_services_manual.name: Non-Essential Services
02_services_manual.desc:
Sets services like Xbox and Search to Manual. Safe.
Risk: Low.

05_power_plan.name: High Performance Plan
05_power_plan.desc:
Activates the performance-focused power plan.
Risk: Low.

06_visual_tweaks.name: Visual Tweaks
06_visual_tweaks.desc:
Disables animations and transparency for better performance.
Risk: Low.

03_disable_recall.name: Disable Windows Recall
03_disable_recall.desc:
Disables AI screen capturing in Windows 11.
Risk: Low.

04_disable_telemetry.name: Disable Telemetry
04_disable_telemetry.desc:
Blocks diagnostic data from being sent to Microsoft.
Risk: Low.

08_privacy_tweaks.name: Privacy Tweaks
08_privacy_tweaks.desc:
Disables advertising ID, activity history, and Cortana.
Risk: None.

07_network_tweaks.name: Network Optimization
07_network_tweaks.desc:
Disables Nagle's Algorithm for lower gaming ping.
Risk: Medium.

11_remove_bloatware.name: Remove Bloatware
11_remove_bloatware.desc:
Removes useless pre-installed apps.
Risk: Low.

12_system_cleanup.name: Deep Cleanup
12_system_cleanup.desc:
Clears caches, temporary folders, and Recycle Bin.
Risk: None.
